prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high-intensity endurance athlete requiring 3000+ calories with carbohydrate loading and hydration strategy

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories across all meals and snacks
Carbohydrates comprise 55-65% of total daily calories with emphasis on complex carbs
Includes specific hydration strategy with fluid and electrolyte intake recommendations
Plan is compact and concise (fits within 1 day format without excessive detail)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-intensity endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration strategy

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and strength with high protein intake (150+ grams daily) and optimized meal timing around weightlifting training

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains minimum 150g protein distributed across all meals
Includes specific meal timing around training window (pre/post-workout nutrition)
Provides 1 full day of meals in compact, easy-to-follow format
Meals are realistic and practical for a single athlete to prepare
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-focused athlete (weightlifter) needing high protein intake (150+ grams) with specific meal timing around training windows

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain lean physique and performance for competitive gymnastics while supporting muscle recovery
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegetarian, no nuts due to allergy

solution_criteria: Total daily calories fall within 1800-2000 range
Meal plan includes 3 meals that are nutrient-dense and support athletic performance and recovery
All meals comply with vegetarian and nut-free restrictions
Plan is presented as a single, compact day format
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a weight-conscious athlete (gymnast or dancer) requiring nutrient-dense, lower-calorie meals (1800-2000 calories) while maintaining performance and recovery
